commit.subject: LU-8066 quota: migrate qmt proc files to debugfs
commit.message:
LU-8066 quota: migrate qmt proc files to debugfs

With the requirement of not using procfs move the quota
qmt proc entries over to debugfs since nearly all of the
items are complex. Also fixed a small bug so now glb-*
debugfs entries are now proper YAML format.

Change-Id: I003841c4e9131db9ac423763fa817097c09ed83d
Signed-off-by: James Simmons <jsimmons@infradead.org>
